text.title: Gcp Org Policies Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns commonly observed when applying the gcp-org-policies methodology. Each pairs a symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Long-lived SA JSON keys allowed; biggest GCP credential-leak vector.
antipattern.fix: Enable the constraint at org level; allow-list specific exceptions only.

antipattern.symptom: Data-residency violation possible at any time.
Shadow-IT API enablement spreads supported surface.
antipattern.fix: Restrict allowed services to the inventory the team operates.
Roll out in `dry-run` mode ≥1 week; review violations; then enforce.
